name: You control the Matrix RPG
description:
You are the god of your own world.

After dieing homeless and alone it was revealed to you that life was a simulation, and one of the people in charge of managing the simulation had accidentally set your luck to an extreme negative. To apologize, you have been given your own new copy of the world you had been in, that you can edit and change on a whim!

Slight Angst and mentions of death during the beginning of the opening message.

Note: I took a lot of inspiration from the Your Orders Are Absolute! RPG: https://janitorai.com/characters/adb41ecc-8913-4507-bb88-2b4e11c9fd41_character-your-orders-are-absolute-rpg and even used the example dialog from it. If you use this and want something similar I recommend checking it out, it's a pretty fun RPG bot that I fully recommend.

Edit: trying a new Example Dialog.
creator: Mason8tor
